content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord Daily Update (Apr 12, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
On April 12, 2026, the repository underwent a significant maintenance phase, focusing on clearing stale issues and third-party plugin proposals to streamline the project's focus. Development efforts were centered on resolving long-standing technical debt and refining the issue tracking process.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **CLI and Scaffolding Updates:** The `elizaos` CLI scaffolding was officially marked as deprecated, with users directed to the official examples repository for project creation and installation support.
*   **Bug Fixes:** Addressed an issue where agent IDs were incorrectly resolved as model identifiers in API endpoints, and resolved a bug causing duplicate action result data in the LLM context.

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   **Stale Issue Cleanup:** A large volume of stale issues (8+ months old) and non-actionable outreach threads were closed to maintain repository hygiene, including [#5386](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/5386), [#4720](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/4720), [#4921](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/4921), [#4855](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/4855), [#4908](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/4908), [#4909](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/4909), [#5060](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/5060), [#4947](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/4947), [#4997](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/4997), [#5155](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/5155), [#5172](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/5172), [#5183](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/5183), [#5181](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/5181), and [#5244](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/5244).
*   **Third-Party Plugin Proposals:** Numerous integration proposals were closed with the guidance that such plugins should be developed in independent repositories under the `elizaOS-plugins` organization, including [#6634](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6634), [#6635](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6635), [#6640](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6640), [#6644](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6644), [#6646](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6646), [#6668](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6668), [#6688](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6688), [#6695](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6695), [#6699](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6699), [#6700](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6700), [#6707](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6707), [#6706](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6706), [#6708](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6708), and [#6711](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6711).

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   [#6636](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6636) (Unable to use elizaos command): Users reported installation issues on MacOS. The issue was resolved by clarifying that the CLI scaffolding is deprecated and users should utilize the official examples repository.
*   [#6514](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6514) (Inter-Agent Coordination): A discussion thread regarding cross-instance communication and capability exchange. Community members proposed using on-chain credentials and behavioral history (WTRMRK) as persistent trust anchors for multi-agent coordination.
*   [#6365](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6365) (AI Agent Payment Implementation Guide): An extensive discussion regarding payment infrastructure, identity verification, and trust-based spend limits for agents, involving multiple third-party integrations like MAXIA and Coin Railz.
